title: EFL Compatibility Artifact
description: Schema for .efdat compatibility artifact files. An .efdat declares relationships between EFL packs and MOMI mods without containing any content of its own. It is a standalone distributable — typically authored by third parties — compiled and checksummed the same way as .efpack.

schemaVersion.description: Artifact schema version. Always 1 for the current format.

datId.description: Globally unique identifier for this compatibility artifact in reverse-domain notation. Convention: <ownerDomain>.compat.<subjectA>.<subjectB>.

name.description: Human-readable name for this compatibility artifact. Convention: 'PackA × PackB Compatibility'.

eflVersion.description: Minimum EFL version required to load this artifact.

author.description: Artifact author. Often a third party, not the original pack authors.

description.description: Short explanation of what this compatibility artifact does and why.

relationships.description: Declared compatibility relationships. EFL evaluates these at load time. The artifact is only activated when all required targets are present.

type.description: Relationship type. requires: artifact only activates when this target is loaded (emits MANIFEST-E003 if missing). optional: artifact can partially activate without it. conflicts: emit MANIFEST-E004 if this target is present alongside the required targets.

target.description: The other pack or mod involved in this relationship.

kind.description: efpack: another EFL content pack. momi: a MOMI mod.

id.description: Pack or mod identifier. For efpack, the modId (reverse domain). For momi, the MOMI mod ID.

versionRange.description: Semver range. Required for type=requires and type=optional. Omit for type=conflicts.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation shown in warnings and errors. Especially useful for conflicts to guide the user on how to resolve them.
